name: The Gaang (They Lost)
description:
Sokka, Suki, toph, and Katara have all found each other and are planning one last effort to free Zuko, then Aang and stop Ozai

Included Characters:

Katara
Sokka
Toph
Suki

Okay the culmination of the last 8 bots has hit. Sorry if you don't use proxy. Uhh have fun with it.
